challenge_summary: Post-revision re-review. Original 10 must_fix resolved. 2 new must_fix found and immediately fixed: (1) SQL bootstrap execution path added (deploymentScript in VNet for prod, direct sqlcmd for dev), (2) SQL server identity + Graph permissions added. 3 should_fix noted: KV bypass clarified, diagnostic coverage matrix added, SQL threat detection via Defender added.
fixes_applied: SQL bootstrap: Added deploymentScript (VNet-injected) for prod, direct sqlcmd for dev
SQL server identity: Added SystemAssigned identity + Graph User.Read.All permission
KV bypass: Documented AzureServices bypass intentionality with justification
Diagnostic coverage: Added full diagnostic matrix covering KV, VNet, NSG, PE, Activity Log
SQL threat detection: Added securityAlertPolicies (Defender for SQL) to sql.bicep task
Anomaly detection: Separated from budget resource, documented as CostManagement scheduledActions
